title: santalum fernandezianum
intro: Santalum fernandezianum, also known as the Juan Fernandez Island Sandalwood or Santalum fernandezianum, is a species of sandalwood tree native to the Juan Fernandez Islands off the coast of Chile. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Santalum fernandezianum include its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Traditionally, the plant's wood and leaves are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
